content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 28, 2001

Lance H. Olson, Esq.
Olson, Hagel, Waters & Fishburn, LLP
Plaza Towers
555 Capitol Mall, Suite 1425
Sacramento, CA 95814-4602

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-032

Dear Mr. Olson:

This correspondence concerns your request for written advice on behalf of Senator John Burton, which was in the final stages of preparation for submission to you. Per your February 28, 2001 phone call to General Counsel Luisa Menchaca, the request for written advice is withdrawn, and the advice letter will not be issued.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

LM:NB:jg
